title: Introduction to Cybersecurity
description: Explore the world of cybersecurity and learn about online safety, privacy, and how to protect systems from digital threats.

title: Networking Basics
description: Learn fundamental concepts of networking including IP addressing, protocols, and how data travels across the internet.

title: Python Essentials 1
description: Start your Python programming journey. Learn variables, data types, loops, functions, and how to write real programs.

title: Junior Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Launch a career in cybersecurity. Covers threat analysis, security monitoring, incident response, and more.

title: Fundamentals of Digital Marketing
description: Master the basics of digital marketing from search to social media and everything in between. Google certified.

title: Introduction to Machine Learning
description: Discover what machine learning is, how it works, and how it's being used in the world around you today.

title: Get Your Business Online
description: Learn how to build a great web presence for your business with a professional website and Google tools.

title: Cloud Computing Fundamentals
description: Learn the foundations of cloud computing, Azure services, and how modern applications are deployed in the cloud.

title: AI Fundamentals (AI-900)
description: Explore core concepts of AI and machine learning, including vision, NLP, and conversational AI with Azure.

title: Data Fundamentals (DP-900)
description: Understand core data concepts and how they're implemented using Microsoft Azure data services.

title: Security Fundamentals (SC-900)
description: Learn the basics of security, compliance, and identity concepts across cloud-based and related Microsoft services.

title: Power BI Data Analyst
description: Deliver actionable insights through data models, reports, and dashboards using Microsoft Power BI.

title: Technology Consulting Virtual Experience
description: Experience what it's like to work at Deloitte. Solve real tech consulting challenges and earn a certificate.

title: Data Analytics Virtual Experience
description: Get hands-on experience in data analytics at Deloitte. Work with real-world datasets and business problems.

title: Cyber Security Virtual Internship
description: Tackle cyber security threats and vulnerabilities in a simulated Deloitte environment. Perfect for aspiring analysts.

title: Python Programming
description: A comprehensive Python course covering all major programming concepts from basics to advanced data structures.

title: Artificial Intelligence Primer
description: Get introduced to AI concepts, applications, and real-world use cases across industries in this beginner course.

title: Agile Scrum Foundation
description: Learn Agile principles and Scrum framework to manage projects efficiently in a fast-paced tech environment.

title: Google Project Management
description: Learn project management basics, Agile methodologies, and how to run successful projects from Google experts.

title: Google Data Analytics
description: Gain hands-on experience with data tools like SQL, Tableau, and R to analyze and visualize data professionally.

title: IBM Data Science Professional
description: Master data science skills with Python, SQL, data visualization, machine learning, and real-world capstone projects.

title: CS50: Introduction to Computer Science
description: Harvard's legendary intro CS course. Learn C, Python, SQL, JavaScript, and build real apps. Free certificate available.

title: Introduction to HTML5
description: Learn how to create well-structured HTML5 pages and understand how browsers and the web actually work.

title: Introduction to SQL
description: Learn to query databases using SQL — one of the most in-demand skills in data, analytics, and backend development.

title: AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials
description: Understand the AWS Cloud, its core services, pricing, support, and architecture best practices.

title: Google Cloud Fundamentals
description: Build a foundation in Google Cloud through introductory courses on core infrastructure and services.

title: Ethical Hacking Essentials
description: Learn ethical hacking fundamentals: footprinting, scanning, enumeration, and basic exploitation techniques.

title: Network Defense Essentials
description: Understand how to defend networks from attacks. Covers firewalls, IDS/IPS, VPNs, and endpoint security.

title: Digital Forensics Essentials
description: Introduction to digital forensics — collecting, preserving, and analyzing digital evidence after incidents.

title: CCNA: Introduction to Networks
description: Start your Cisco CCNA journey. Learn network concepts, switches, routers, and how to configure network devices.

title: Excel Skills for Business
description: Learn Excel from the basics to advanced functions, charts, pivot tables, and automation for business use.

title: UI/UX Design Fundamentals
description: Learn UX research, wireframing, prototyping, and design thinking to build great user experiences.

title: Introduction to Generative AI
description: Understand what generative AI is, how it differs from traditional AI, and how to use Google tools for GenAI.

title: Responsible AI: Applying AI Principles
description: Learn how to identify and mitigate bias in AI, and apply Google's responsible AI practices to real projects.

title: TCS iON Career Edge – Young Professional
description: Industry-ready skills for job seekers: communication, MS Office, resume writing, soft skills, and aptitude.

title: DevOps on AWS
description: Learn DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, and AWS tools like CodePipeline, CodeBuild, and CloudFormation.

title: Accenture Developer Virtual Experience
description: Work on real Accenture-style coding challenges involving software development, architecture, and problem-solving.

title: JPMorgan Software Engineering Virtual Experience
description: Interface with real financial data and JPMorgan's open-source frameworks. Fix code and create live graphs.

title: Introduction to IoT
description: Explore the Internet of Things: sensors, actuators, smart devices, and how everything connects in modern networks.

title: Prompt Engineering for ChatGPT
description: Master the art of writing effective prompts for large language models to get better outputs for any task.

title: Introduction to Blockchain
description: Understand blockchain fundamentals, distributed ledgers, smart contracts, and how blockchain is transforming industries.

title: AWS Solutions Architect Learning Path
description: Design and deploy scalable, highly available systems on AWS. Prepares for the SAA-C03 certification exam.

title: NPTEL – Programming in Java
description: Government-backed Java programming course from IIT Kharagpur. Get an NPTEL certificate upon completion.

title: NPTEL – Database Management Systems
description: Comprehensive DBMS course covering relational models, SQL, normalization, transactions, and storage systems.

title: PMKVY Digital Literacy
description: Government of India skill certification. Learn digital tools, internet safety, and basic computer skills.

title: LinkedIn Marketing Labs: Certified
description: Learn LinkedIn advertising, campaign management, and how to run successful B2B marketing campaigns.

title: Meta Front-End Developer
description: Learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and UX design. Build a portfolio of real-world front-end projects.

title: Microsoft Azure DevOps Engineer Expert
description: Design and implement DevOps practices for version control, compliance, infrastructure, CI/CD, monitoring on Azure.

title: Introduction to Cybersecurity Tools & Attacks
description: Learn about key cybersecurity concepts, tools used by attackers, and how security professionals defend systems.

title: Salesforce Admin Virtual Internship
description: Experience Salesforce admin work: build flows, manage users, and customize Salesforce for business needs.
